title: goodyera zollingeri
intro: Goodyera zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's rattlesnake plant, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Goodyera zollingeri include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and is also used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures and infusions.
